note: Curated registry of live OKX.AI marketplace ASPs Foreman can hire. Refresh manually with: onchainos agent search --query <capability> --status active. Only A2MCP services with a public https endpoint are hireable. Prices are quoted USDT0 per call; the hirer refuses any challenge above the quote.

subcontractors.notes: Token scans, Skynet scores, EVM traces. Rating 100, sold 87, securityRate 5.0 as of 2026-07-17.
BUY/CAUTION/BLOCK verdict via query params address and chain. Does not cover X Layer; used only when the caller names a supported chain. Rating 100 as of 2026-07-17.
Direction, confidence, and key levels for one asset. Rating 89 as of 2026-07-17.
Polymarket and Kalshi odds analysis. Price exceeds the default MAX_SPEND_PER_SUBCALL of 0.10, so it is only hired when the cap is raised; the planner otherwise prefers prex-market-analysis.
